---
name: Bug report
about: Something does not work as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the problem.

## How to reproduce

The exact command you ran, and the config you used (you can paste it, with secrets removed):

```bash
social-auto generate ...
```

## Expected

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS:
- Node version (`node --version`):
- FFmpeg version (`ffmpeg -version` first line):
- Claude Code version if relevant (`claude --version`):

## Logs

Run again with `--verbose` and paste the relevant output.
